name: G2→G3 Zone 3 — Volcanic Approach Wandering Monsters
description: Wandering monster table for Zone 3 (Days 5–6): The mountain breathes. Heat replaces cold. Fire-adapted creatures appear. Frost giant patrols have been replaced by fire giant ones. Check frequency: once per 8 hours of travel, once per 8 hours of rest.

results.text: 1d4 Fire Giants (perimeter patrol heading north from G3) [PF2e Lvl 10 each]
1d3 Chimeras (fire-adapted sub-species; partially fire-resistant) [PF2e Lvl 8 each]
1d6 Firenewts + 1 Firenewt Warrior Leader [PF2e Lvl 2 / Lvl 4]
1 Young Red Dragon (G3's aerial presence; allied with fire giants) [PF2e Lvl 10]
2d6 Goblins (G3 tributaries; fleeing from something south of them) [PF2e Lvl –1 each]
2d4 Fire Trolls (volcanic variant; fire does not stop regeneration) [PF2e Lvl 7 each]
1d4 Salamanders (semi-intelligent; may be spoken with; not initially hostile) [PF2e Lvl 5 each]
3 Ogres + 1 Ogre Mage (G3 supply detachment heading north with provisions) [PF2e Lvl 3 / Lvl 8]
2d6 Orcs (G3-allied; manning a forward campsite) [PF2e Lvl 1 each]
1d4 Firedrakes (nesting in the geothermal vents) [PF2e Lvl 5 each]
1 Fire Giant + 2d4 Hell Hounds (escort patrol; aggressive) [PF2e Lvl 10 / Lvl 5]
1 Efreeti (lost, irritable, traveling; not interested in the party unless provoked) [PF2e Lvl 12]
HAZARD — Lava surge: a channel cracks open; DC 20 Reflex or 6d6 fire damage; creates a 20-foot barrier until cooled (1d4 hours)
1 Fire Giant Sub-Chief (on a solo inspection; knows the party does not belong here) [PF2e Lvl 12]
1d3 Adult Red Dragons (patrolling the volcanic approaches; fire giant allies) [PF2e Lvl 14 each — flee]
